feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Getting Cannot get/ error after deploying SAP BTP project.
entry.content:
Hii everyone , 
i am writing this post becuase i am getting a unexpected error on my project after deployment on cloud foundry

 this is my ui after doing  cds watch profile but when i deploy this on cloud foundry i am getting  and error 

https://d6477c92trial-dev-hanaapp-srv.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/

Cannot GET /

 

but when i want inner data it provide me 
https://d6477c92trial-dev-hanaapp-srv.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/odata/v4/its-customer/customer

 

when i seach the issue i get this >-----{The root URL ("/") might not be defined in your service.}

so how i can solve this issue and what file i need to upload here so All You can help me to  resolve this issue.

entry.title: Problem availability control for internal order
entry.content:
I have a problem referred to the availability control for internal order when post a service entry sheet with posting date different by delivery date of PO. This is my set in customizing for Budget Profile.

My problem is:

1) I create a PO with delivery date 31.12.2023 and in this way availability control is correct

2) I create a SES in 2024 for example posting date 31.03.2024. In this moment my budget is finished for 2024, but the system allow me to post the SES and the assigned value of budget begin negative without block the post.

This is the result in report:

How can I solve this problem? I think that the system blocks the posting if on Internal Order there isn't budget for the next year.

Best regards.

Alessandro

entry.title: CDS Views for Price Simulation of Customer/Material Combination in sales SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi team,

As per the requirement by Business,I wanted to create a report for a pricing simulation of sales order where price is maintained on Customer/Material Combination with Discount and Tax value.Please suggest a solution where I can fetch data in the form of report.

Also,kindly suggest a CDS View if available as its a priority kindly help 

Regards 

Dhanush

entry.title: Back Date Forecast not considered in MRP Run in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While running MRP in SAP business one system does not consider current month or current week forecast because system considers forecast at the first day of the period (month or week), So that the first day is passed and now we are in between the period (month or week), the system skips that forecast. How to fix it so that system start considering forecast of that period.

Thanking you ahead of time.

entry.title: Program name to use MF47 in background
entry.content: I need to save the errors in MF47 in background processing , which programe name can i use it in SM36 .

entry.title: cloud foundry deployment failed
entry.content: Getting this error after i perform cf deploy mta_archive command,

entry.title: The runtime resources from previous The runtime resources from previous subscription have not been c
entry.content:
This is the problem I'm facing, can anyone help me with this.

The runtime resources from previous subscription have not been cleaned up. Please delete existing Process Integration Runtime Service Instances from the BTP Cockpit or retry after some time.

entry.title: Client level number range task
entry.content:
Hello! I'm new to SAP HCM and have been assigned a task to check the client-level number range assignment. For example, a company XYZ has 19 entities, from A to S. The requirement is that when Company A hires an employee, the personnel number should be 1. If Company B hires an employee, the personnel number should be 2, and so on. This numbering process should also apply to organizational objects, such as position, job, and task. Could you guide me on how to set up this configuration in SAP HCM?

Regards,

Anna

entry.title: Possibilities of Cost Center
entry.content:
Hello! I'm new to SAP HCM and have been assigned a task involving an employee who works for different organizations. The requirement is to assign cost centers from different companies with specific percentages, meaning 30% of the cost will be covered by Company A, 65% by Company B, and 5% by Company C. Could you guide me on how to configure this in SAP HCM?

Regards,

entry.title: Current number range exhausted. Shall we overwrite the same interval range in each client or create
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

Our current number range for customer service object have exhausted. Shall we overwrite the new range or create new interval and let existing interval as is in each client. Kindly suggest.

entry.title: Column Remordplan SAP PS reporting S_ALR_87013558 PS
entry.content:
Dear experts,

launching the S_ALR_87013558 - Budget/Actual/Commitment/Rem Plan/Assigned report for a project, in the REMORDPLAN column for each WBE-related maintenance order does not return the detail of the planned value giving value 0.00. Instead, for each WBE the total value is correctly reported. Could you please explain the reason for this?

I have this problem for all S_ALR reports that contain the "REMORDPLAN" column.

Below the screen details. The system is ECC EHP8.

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP HANA XSA nodejs Error - IsGlobalEmpty()
entry.content:
Getting below error in nodejs xsa application.

Fatal error in , line 0
9/3/24 3:25:12.318 PM [APP/50-2] ERR   # Check failed: IsGlobalEmpty().
9/3/24 3:25:12.318 PM [APP/50-2] ERR   #

9/3/24 3:25:12.318 PM [APP/50-2] ERR   #
9/3/24 3:25:12.318 PM [APP/50-2] ERR   #FailureMessage Object: 0x7ffd802706f0Node.js 28457 crashed! Creating error

entry.title: SAP Netweaver 7.4 supported on power 10 running AIX
entry.content: Kindly i need to know if SAP Netweaver 7.4 supported on power 10 also if anyone know how i can get access to SAP PAM

entry.title: 手形と前受/前払金の特殊仕訳取引が定義されていませんMsg 番号 FP030
FBRA Error: 'Document XXXXXXXXX is not purely a clearing document,
entry.content:
An error was encountered in FBRA: 'Document XXXXXXXXX is not purely a clearing document,' and no further details were provided in the error message.

Here's what happened:

  1. The user posted a customer payment document through F-28.
  2. They manually allocated the payment to two DR documents as full payment.
  3. Due to the erroneous posting of the DZ document, the user needed to reverse the clearing document through FBRA, but the above error was encountered.

Could you please help us resolve this error and explain what triggered it?

Thanks

entry.title: Inquiry on Linkage Between "Activate Advanced Valuation" and "Define Alternative Reconciliation"
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I hope this message finds you well.

I'm currently working on configuring SAP and have come across two specific areas that I need some clarification on:

  1. 103315_Activate Advanced Valuation – I understand this configuration is related to handling of complex valuation scenarios like Balance Sheet Reclassification, Impairment, Foreign Currency Valuations and Discounting of Receivables and Payables.

  2. 102631_Define Alternative Reconciliation – This configuration seems to pertain to setting up alternative reconciliation methods by assigning an alternative reconciliation account if we want to reconcile some transactions differently from the normal business.

My question is whether these two configurations are interconnected or if they operate independently. Specifically:

  • Are there any dependencies between "Activate Advanced Valuation" and "Define Alternative Reconciliation"?
  • Could changes or settings in one configuration impact the other?
  • Are there best practices or considerations when configuring these two areas together?

To share an example: I have assigned an alternative reconciliation account to the target account mentioned in the Advanced Valuation configuration, but the document is still being posted to the target account specified when I am running the general ledger job for post-balance sheet reclassification. I am attaching some screenshots to illustrate the issue:

Any insights or experiences you can share would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
CA Amar Modanwal.

entry.title: Fiori Launchpad - Display one Fiori group per tab in
entry.content:
Hello,

We want to show only one group in one tab on main page but it shows all groups as list and scrolls down when user click group tab. We did configuration as the screenshot below but Main Page still shows all groups in one page.

But if we change user setting to "Show one group at a time" , the page works as we want perfectly. How can we set this setting for all users?

Thanks.

entry.title: Cross-company stock transfer: Condition P101 in billing document twice
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

we do cross company stock transfer orders (STO). The process works just fine, but we came along one strange thing:

For billing, we defined a pricing procedure similar to standard ICAA01, but with just one (!) price condition, condition type P101. Price source was set to A (Purchase Order) to copy the condition value for P101 from the STO to the billing document.

Now, when we create a billing document, there are two (!) rows for condition type P101.

 

The first one is marked red (incorrect), it has a value of zero. Further values:
Condition class: B Prices
Calculat.Type: C Quantity
Condit.Category: H Basic price
Cond.Control: A Adjust for quantity variance
Condit.Origin: A Automatic Pricing
Inactive: X Inactive vie formulas or incorrect

 

The second P101 works just as planned, the condition value is copied from the STO and Price Source is A (Purchase order). Further values:
Condition class: B Prices
Calculat.Type: C Quantity
Condit.Category: G Internal price
Cond.Control: H Condition value fixed (cost price)
Condit.Origin: A Automatic Pricing

Now my questions: Why is the first row generated and why is it incorrect?

Any ideas?

Thanks
Jens

entry.title: When I use BDC TO CALL TRANSACTION VA05,There are NO data return in internal table：lt_message
entry.content:
My code are as follow：
  DATA: ctu_parameters TYPE ctu_params.
  ctu_parameters-dismode = 'N'.  "后台更新模式
  ctu_parameters-updmode = 'S'.  "同步更新
  ctu_parameters-racommit = 'X'. "No abortion by COMMIT WORK 
CALL TRANSACTION 'VA05' USING bdcdata[] OPTIONS FROM ctu_parameters
     MESSAGES INTO lt_message .

And then i change the code as follow，It still doesn't take effect
 *  DATA: ctu_parameters TYPE ctu_params.
*  ctu_parameters-dismode = 'N'.  "后台更新模式
*  ctu_parameters-updmode = 'L'.  "后台更新
*  ctu_parameters-defsize = 'X'.  "默认大小
*  ctu_parameters-racommit = 'X'. "No abortion by COMMIT WORK
*  ctu_parameters-nobinpt = 'X'. "批输入处理活动
*  ctu_parameters-nobiend = 'X'. "批输入处理活动

entry.title: Former user
entry.content:
hi
I had a lot of blogs that I wrote in the past and now they are all associated with Former user? How can I transfer them to my user?

https://community.sap.com/t5/user/viewprofilepage/user-id/182675

Naor
